// Fallback: force remove loading overlay even if other resources fail window.addEventListener("load", function() { var loader = document.getElementById("pageLoading"); if (loader && !loader.classList.contains("removed")) { loader.classList.add("hidden"); setTimeout(function(){ loader.classList.add("removed"); }, 300); } });
